title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services:
Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services!
